notes_for_human_reviewer: Ceiling submission. Tiered into 'fix before sending' and 'build into process' — exactly the right shape. Three-section restructuring shown with concrete example for CR-031 including notes-context rationale. Every action audited with specific owner/date proposals; all three TBDs resolved with concrete one-Slack-message moves. Attribution analysis catches both CR-031 and CR-033 over-claims with chapter-aligned rewrites; evaluative phrasing called out across all three entries with specific instances. F. Demir aside cut with reasoning. Distribution audit expands to absent attendees AND vendor (with the smart extract-vs-full-minutes distinction for R. Singh). Living-artifact discipline covers full action tracker design, pre-meeting review as first agenda item, chase-privately framing. Correction posture is verbatim chapter framing. Live-capture move taught for next time. Closes with explicit humility on two specific uncertainties and offers to spot-check the revised version. This is what we want every learner producing.
